title: Payment
description: Commerce v1 payment contract. Payment must not be marked paid without Payment Gateway, Core, Accounting Review for bank transfer, or COD collection confirmation.
$comment: Sources: TECH-04 Payment Confirmation state model and direct bank transfer rule. Customer transfer image is PAYMENT_REVIEW, not PAID. TODO: source documents do not define full provider payload schema.

payment_method.description: Payment method such as bank transfer or COD. TODO: define official payment method enum.

payment_reference.description: Reference used by gateway, bank transfer, COD collection, or accounting review.

bank_transfer_id.description: Bank transfer record when payment method is transfer.

accounting_review_id.description: Accounting review required for direct bank transfer confirmation.

cod_collection_status.description: COD collection status when payment method is COD.

paid_requires_confirmation.description: Invariant: no paid state without confirmation.
